problem: Why do amyloid plaques form in Alzheimer's and can they be cleared?
hypothesis: If Monoclonal antibody blocking protein-protein interaction is applied to they, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: In vitro cell culture assay with 17 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
